caption:
💫 They said the old science building was abandoned, but they hadn’t been up here since the ‘90s… 📚✨ Tonight, I’m hosting an after-hours seminar on “Optics & Urban Perspectives,” and let’s just say the acoustics are *chef’s kiss* 👩‍🏫🔥 I’m wearing my usual campus armor: a charcoal wrap dress that hugs every curve, a structured blazer that hides but hints at my silhouette, and heels that click like a metronome down these marble halls. 🕊️👠 When the students finally file out, I stay behind to adjust the vintage slide projector. That’s when the hidden brass door clicks open behind the bookshelf… 🚪✨ I step into the rooftop observatory-turned-greenhouse, and suddenly it’s all soft amber light and glass panes fogged with evening dew. 🌿🌙 And there he is. Luca, our visiting optics researcher, already sketching the orrery by candlelight. His sleeves are rolled up, wrist brushing the cool brass, and when he looks up, his eyes drop to my collarbone, then back to my face. 😳✨ “You always keep the secrets, Professor?” he murmurs, voice echoing softly in the dome. 📖🔥 I smile, leaning against the railing as the city lights bleed through the glass. “Some illusions only work in the dark,” I reply, letting my blazer slip just slightly off one shoulder. 🌃👗 The air smells like old paper, rain, and his cedarwood cologne. He walks over, fingers tracing the edge of a slide frame. “Fascinating how a simple lens can change what you see… or make it ache.” 🔍💫 Our hands brush reaching for the same projector knob. A spark. A pause. His thumb lingers near my pulse. 📸✨ I bite my lip, feeling the familiar thrill of academia meeting something… untamed. “Tomorrow’s lecture’s on refraction,” I whisper, stepping closer until the heat between us is undeniable. “But tonight? We’re experimenting with focus.” 🔬💖 The projector hums to life, casting our overlapping shadows against the glass. And somewhere between the star charts and the ticking clock, I know this semester just got a lot more interesting. 🌌👩‍🏫✨ 

#ProfessorDiaries #CampusSecrets #AcademicChic #UniversityLife #AfterHoursLectures #OpticsAndDesire #TeacherVibes
